method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: Solid stop profile similarity paired with age and kilometer correlations justify a fair level of similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Very high indicates common stopping behavior.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Age and similar kilometers enhance comparative strengths.

1311.llm_rationale: Basic elements such as purpose and route produce weak alignment overall.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Moderate suggesting some potential but not meaningful.

1312.llm_rationale: High stop profile and kilometer similarity fine-tune correlations despite lower route similarities.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low similarity suggests varied operational routes.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Similar purpose augments the behavioral understanding.

1687.llm_rationale: Issues in stop profile and route characteristics lead to diminished similarities.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Moderate, yet insufficiently aligns with operational context.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose differentiation further negatively influences similarity.

1993.llm_rationale: Good behavioral alignment seen in stop profile and duty cycle; low purpose match detracts slightly.

2191.llm_rationale: Continuous high stopping trends yet lower correlations arise from purpose and route variations.

2518.llm_rationale: While the stop profile similarity promotes correlation, route and purpose misalignments curtail its maximum potential.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Again low indicating distinct operational routes.

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
